remote.fastapi/openapi.json_body: {"openapi":"3.1.0","info":{"title":"FastAPI","version":"0.1.0"},"paths":{"/upload_image":{"post":{"summary":"Upload Image","description":"Receive a npy file from the client and set it as the main image in PromptManager.","operationId":"upload_image_upload_image_post","requestBody":{"content":{"multipart/form-data":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/Body_upload_image_upload_image_post"}}}},"responses":{"200":{"description":"Successful Response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{}}}},"422":{"description":"Validation Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"}}}}}}},"/upload_segment":{"post":{"summary":"Upload Segment","description":"Receive a gzipped npy file from the client and set it as the segmentation in PromptManager.","operationId":"upload_segment_upload_segment_post","requestBody":{"content":{"multipart/form-data":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/Body_upload_segment_upload_segment_post"}}}},"responses":{"200":{"description":"Successful Response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{}}}},"422":{"description":"Validation Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"}}}}}}},"/add_point_interaction":{"post":{"summary":"Add Point Interaction","description":"Receives a point (voxel_coord) + positive/negative. Updates the model & returns a binary mask.","operationId":"add_point_interaction_add_point_interaction_post","requestBody":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/PointParams"}}},"required":true},"responses":{"200":{"description":"Successful Response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{}}}},"422":{"description":"Validation Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"}}}}}}},"/add_bbox_interaction":{"post":{"summary":"Add Bbox Interaction","description":"Receives bounding box corners + positive/negative. Updates model & returns a mask.","operationId":"add_bbox_interaction_add_bbox_interaction_post","requestBody":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/BBoxParams"}}},"required":true},"responses":{"200":{"description":"Successful Response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{}}}},"422":{"description":"Validation Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"}}}}}}},"/add_lasso_interaction":{"post":{"summary":"Add Lasso Interaction","description":"Receives a gzipped npy mask + positive/negative. Treated as a 'lasso' 3D mask.","operationId":"add_lasso_interaction_add_lasso_interaction_post","requestBody":{"content":{"multipart/form-data":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/Body_add_lasso_interaction_add_lasso_interaction_post"}}},"required":true},"responses":{"200":{"description":"Successful Response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{}}}},"422":{"description":"Validation Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"}}}}}}},"/add_scribble_interaction":{"post":{"summary":"Add Scribble Interaction","description":"Receives a scribble mask + positive/negative. Updates model, returns updated segmentation.","operationId":"add_scribble_interaction_add_scribble_interaction_post","requestBody":{"content":{"multipart/form-data":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/Body_add_scribble_interaction_add_scribble_interaction_post"}}},"required":true},"responses":{"200":{"description":"Successful Response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{}}}},"422":{"description":"Validation Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"}}}}}}}},"components":{"schemas":{"BBoxParams":{"properties":{"outer_point_one":{"items":{"type":"integer"},"type":"array","title":"Outer Point One"},"outer_point_two":{"items":{"type":"integer"},"type":"array","title":"Outer Point Two"},"positive_click":{"type":"boolean","title":"Positive Click"}},"type"
